creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
How-To-Repeat: install www/linux-f10-flashplugin11

$ ln -s /usr/local/lib/npapi/linux-f10-flashplugin/libflashplayer.so ~/.mozilla/plugins
$ linux-firefox 'http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=<video_id_here>'
(process:53136): Gtk-WARNING **: Locale not supported by C library.
        Using the fallback 'C' locale.
###!!! ABORT: can't create crash reporter socketpair(): file /builds/slave/rel-m-esr10-lnx-bld/build/toolkit/crashreporter/nsExceptionHandler.cpp, line 1895
###!!! ABORT: can't create crash reporter socketpair(): file /builds/slave/rel-m-esr10-lnx-bld/build/toolkit/crashreporter/nsExceptionHandler.cpp, line 1895
ExceptionHandler::GenerateDump waitpid failed:Invalid argument
Exit 1

with NSPR_LOG_MODULES=all:5 it crashes just after

674722624[28539270]: nsPluginHost::InstantiateEmbeddedPlugin Begin mime=application/x-shockwave-flash, owner=47084880, url=http://s.ytimg.com/yt/swfbin/watch_as3-<video_id>.swf
674722624[28539270]: nsPluginHost::TrySetupPluginInstance Begin mime=application/x-shockwave-flash, owner=47084880, url=http://s.ytimg.com/yt/swfbin/watch_as3-<video_id>.swf
674722624[28539270]: nsPluginHost::GetPlugin Begin mime=application/x-shockwave-flash, plugin=libflashplayer.so
674722624[28539270]: NPN callbacks initialized
674722624[28539270]: static mozilla::PluginLibrary* mozilla::plugins::PluginModuleParent::LoadModule(const char*)
